steps.title: Locate the fossil's age in the passage
steps.content: The passage explicitly states that Wang and colleagues discovered a 164-million-year-old plant fossil in China. This is the direct answer to the question. The Jurassic period's time range (145–201 million years ago) is mentioned as geological context, not as the age of this fossil.

steps.title: Match the stated age to the correct choice
steps.content: The correct answer must state 164 million years old, exactly as the passage describes the discovered fossil. The other choices either use numbers from the Jurassic period's range or misstate the information. That matches Choice C — 164 million years old.
